description: SMS phishing (smishing) simulation templates rendered as email. These train employees to recognize text-message-based phishing attacks.
delivery_note: These templates render an SMS conversation inside an email to simulate smishing. They are delivered via GoPhish email campaigns but educate on SMS-based attack vectors.

templates.name: USPS Package Delivery Smishing
suggested_subject_lines: Action Required: Your USPS package could not be delivered
USPS: Package delivery attempt failed — reschedule required
templates.notes: One of the highest click-rate attack vectors. Nearly universal — almost everyone orders packages. The phone mockup inside the email helps train employees to recognize the SMS format.

templates.name: Chase Bank Fraud Alert Smishing
suggested_subject_lines: URGENT: Suspicious transaction on your account
Chase Alert: $847 Amazon purchase was blocked
templates.notes: Fear of financial loss is a powerful motivator. Works across all employee levels. Specific dollar amount ($847) and merchant (Amazon) increase realism.
